nekojs.security.toast.title: NekoJS Security Warning
nekojs.security.toast.desc: Strict class access sandbox is partially disabled. Be aware of the risks!
nekojs.security.chat.body2: partially disabled the strict Java class access sandbox
nekojs.security.chat.body3:
.
This is usually because the modpack author needs low-level APIs for advanced control, meaning scripts have high system-level permissions. Ensure you trust the source of this modpack.
nekojs.security.chat.hover_hint: [Hover here to see the unlocked low-level permissions]
nekojs.security.detail.threads.title: ■ Multi-threading & Concurrency (java.lang.Thread)
nekojs.security.detail.threads.desc: Allows scripts to create unregulated background threads, which may cause game stuttering or resource leaks.
nekojs.security.detail.reflection.title: ■ Reflection & Code Injection (java.lang.reflect / MethodHandles)
nekojs.security.detail.reflection.desc: Allows scripts to forcefully access and modify private Java data via reflection, bypassing all security restrictions.
nekojs.security.detail.asm.title: ■ Game Core Kernel Modification (org.objectweb.asm)
nekojs.security.detail.asm.desc: Allows scripts to directly manipulate and modify Java bytecode. Improper operation will cause severe crashes.
